metadata.title:
COLUMBIA G. RED MOUNTAIN


RAILWAY COMPANY

pages.raw_text:
Notice of Stockholders Meeting.
WASH, OCT. 81, 1907.


The annual meeting of the
stockholders of the Columbia &
Red Mountain Railway Company
will be held at the office of the said
company in the City of Spokane,
Washington, on the 18th day Of
November, 1907, at 1870 a. m, for
the purpose of electing trustees
and for the transaction of such
other business as may be brought
before said meeting


Among the business to be trans
acted at said meeting will be con-
sideration of and action upon a
proposition to sell and convey to
the Great Northern Railway Com.
pany all Of the railways and prop
critics Of every name and nature
owned by the Columbia & Red
Mountain Railway Company.


The stock transfer books will be
closed at $3.50 o'clock p. m. on
Thursday, Oct. 81, 1907, and re-
main closed until 10 a. m, Nov.
IL, 1907.


w. H. FORTIER, Secretary.
